# pexip_infinity_log_level (Resource)

Manages a log level configuration with the Infinity service. Log levels control the verbosity of system logging for troubleshooting and monitoring.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_log_level" "example" {
  name = "pexip.media"
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the log level configuration. Maximum length: 250 characters.

### Optional

- `level` (String) The log level. Valid values: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the log level in Infinity.
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the log level in Infinity
